parameters.query: SELECT param5 AS ad_id, COUNT(*) AS crm_leads, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Depositor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS crm_depositors, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Depositor' THEN cost ELSE 0 END), 2) AS crm_revenue FROM leads WHERE param5 IS NOT NULL AND param5 != '' AND param5 REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) GROUP BY param5

SELECT param5 AS ad_id, COUNT(*) AS crm_leads_today, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Depositor' THEN cost ELSE 0 END), 2) AS crm_revenue_today FROM leads WHERE param5 IS NOT NULL AND param5 != '' AND param5 REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' AND created_at >= CURDATE() GROUP BY param5
